{{- /* Language switcher: one compact link per configured language (the language code, e.g. EN / UK). Links to the current page's translation when it exists, otherwise that language's home. Iterating site.Sites makes each language's home resolve correctly even with the default language served at the root. Renders nothing when only one language is configured. */ -}} {{- if gt (len hugo.Sites) 1 -}}
{{- range hugo.Sites -}} {{- $s := . -}} {{- $tr := "" -}} {{- range $.AllTranslations -}} {{- if eq .Language.Lang $s.Language.Lang -}}{{- $tr = .RelPermalink -}}{{- end -}} {{- end -}} {{- $href := or $tr $s.Home.RelPermalink -}} {{- $cur := eq $s.Language.Lang site.Language.Lang -}} {{ $s.Language.Lang | upper }} {{- end -}}
{{- end -}}
